headline: Want $100 in Super-Safe Monthly Dividend Income? Invest $11,955 Into These 2 High-Octane Income Stocks Yielding an Average of 10.04%!
summary: One monthly dividend payer has maintained a double-digit yield for over 15 years, while the other has raised its payout 134 times since 1994.

headline: Realty Income, Apollo Form $1B Joint Venture for Retail Portfolio
summary: Realty Income Corporation (NYSE:O) is included among the Dividend Kings and Aristocrats List: 32 Biggest Stocks. On March 19, Realty Income Corporation (NYSE:O) and Apollo said that Apollo-managed funds and affiliates plan to invest $1.0 billion in Realty Income.
